title: Yijing Hexagram 39: Jian (Obstruction)
description: Hexagram 39 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 39 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Obstruction. The southwest furthers. The northeast does not further. It furthers one to see the great man.
